title: Pennisetum fallax
taxonomy: Pennisetum fallax is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Pennisetum, which consists of various species of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions. Pennisetum fallax is further divided into several subcategories based on its morphological characteristics and geographical distribution. The classification of Pennisetum fallax is based on its unique features such as its leaf structure, flower arrangement, and growth habit. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and adaptation patterns of the species within its ecosystem.

intro: Pennisetum fallax, also known as African grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae.
